rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal — Beirut strikes and Middle East tensions remain distant background noise with only indirect energy price relevance.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut; Iran deal uncertainty persists
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability poses a minor indirect risk to EU energy prices, which could affect Portuguese consumers, but no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: UK-Japan £18bn investment deal agreed
top_events.summary: A large bilateral trade deal between UK and Japan has negligible direct impact on Portugal's economy or daily life.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama) is a minor regional safety note but has no meaningful impact on Portuguese residents.
